title: eragrostis hornemanniana
intro: Eragrostis hornemanniana, also known as Hornemann's love grass or Hornemann's lovegrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, and has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-diabetic properties. Eragrostis hornemanniana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
